use_cases: Booking consultation calls with professionals or service providers
Scheduling video meetings or appointments with customizable duration
Selecting available time slots across different timezones
Managing calendar availability for one-on-one sessions
Enabling users to reserve appointment slots for services
ai_summary: A comprehensive appointment scheduling component featuring a calendar date picker with month navigation, time slot selection grid, timezone support with 12h/24h format toggle, and meeting details display including host avatar and meeting type. Built with shadcn/ui-style components for clean, professional booking interfaces.
